use_cases: Organizing dashboard features like views, alerts, and reports into collapsible sections
Creating FAQ or help documentation with expandable answers
Building settings panels with categorized options
Displaying product feature explanations with icons
Structuring navigation menus in admin interfaces
ai_summary: An icon-based accordion component featuring four expandable items (Views, Alerts, Boards & Graphs, Screen) with color-coded icons from Lucide React. Each item reveals descriptive text when clicked, with smooth expand/collapse animations using Framer Motion. Supports light and dark modes, making it ideal for dashboard interfaces, settings panels, and organized content navigation in SaaS applications.
